__fixture__.name: restore_provenance_layout_only
__fixture__.scenario: A user re-opens Aureline and the session-restore manifest rehydrates window topology, pane layout, and visual tokens without restoring any authored settings, keybindings, or snippets. No portable profile was applied. Fidelity is layout_only; restore_level is layout_only; only the layout_restore_sanity validator ran.

included_state_classes.notes: Only window topology, pane geometry, and visual tokens were rehydrated.
Session-restore state is local_only; it never crossed a machine boundary and was read from the local session-restore manifest.

post_restore_validator_outcomes.note: All restored panes resolved to known surfaces; no stale pane ids.

notes: layout_only restores do not require an equivalence map or a rollback checkpoint; only layout_restore_sanity is attached.
